summary:
EXECUTIVE READ
India activity concentrates in colocation and power layers, led by Maharashtra, Telangana, Uttar Pradesh, and Karnataka, with policy tailwinds from state data centre policies and power open access. The top India policy hook is the UP Data Centre Policy 2026 targeting Rs 2 lakh crore investment. Value-chain movers include hyperscalers expanding capacity and investors like Blackstone and Brookfield anchoring large-scale commitments. Foreign hyperscalers are actively scaling in India, with Amazon leading at $48 billion, followed by Microsoft, Google, and AWS.

top_plays.headline: Sify expands 500 MW data centre in Andhra Pradesh with new land allocation and capacity sales
top_plays.why_now: Sify filed a 6-K on 2026-07-16 reporting sale of 5 MW capacity in India (filings stream). Concurrently, Andhra Pradesh allocated 25 acres for Sify's 500 MW data center expansion on 2026-07-07 (news stream). These independent streams confirm active expansion in Vizag under Andhra Pradesh's DDL power-policy framework.
top_plays.state_hook: Andhra Pradesh: Vizag mega AI/hyperscale execution and official DDL power-policy innovation.

top_plays.headline: STT GDC India commissions AI-ready data centre in Jaipur, Rajasthan with 6 MW capacity
top_plays.why_now: STT GDC India inaugurated an AI-ready data centre in Jaipur on 2026-07-17 (policy stream: ec28dfc020f1). Multiple news outlets reported the launch of the 6 MW AI-ready data center in Jaipur on 2026-07-16 (news stream: 30fbdd74a848, 95db3b3e0eb5, 3446dfc3c436, c99d692a7bda). This combines policy confirmation with on-ground execution in Rajasthan.
top_plays.state_hook: Rajasthan: no state match yet — site-selection is the opening

top_plays.headline: Blackstone prepares $30 billion India data centre investment via AirTrunk platform with new APAC infrastructure head
top_plays.why_now: Blackstone launched APAC infrastructure platform and appointed India infra head on 2026-07-16 (news stream: 448356e47ce5). This follows earlier news from 2026-06-05 about Blackstone-backed AirTrunk planning $30 billion investment in India's data centres by 2030 (news stream: bf65118bf810, c976f941d792, c45eea080806). The recent leadership appointment signals imminent execution of the committed investment.
top_plays.state_hook: no state match yet — site-selection is the opening
